title: Teque Paella
description: A flavorful and hearty Spanish-inspired dish featuring richly roasted vegetables, teque sauce, and paella rice. This recipe serves 4-6 people and is perfect for a weekend dinner.
instructions: Heat the olive oil in a large paella pan over medium-high heat.
Add the chopped onion and sauté until translucent, about 3-4 minutes.
Add the chopped red bell pepper and sauté for another 2-3 minutes.
Add the chopped zucchini and sauté for another 2-3 minutes.
Add the minced garlic and sauté for 1 minute, until fragrant.
Add the paella rice and stir to combine with the vegetables and oil.
Add the teque sauce and stir to combine.
Add 2 cups of water to the paella pan and bring to a boil.
Reduce the heat to low and simmer, covered, for 20-25 minutes, or until the rice is cooked and the liquid has been absorbed.
Remove the paella pan from the heat and let it rest for 5 minutes before serving.
